query: SELECT u.id, u.name, up.dayMasterElement, up.favorableElements, up.unfavorableElements FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.userId WHERE up.dayMasterElement IS NULL OR up.userId IS NULL ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, up.dayMasterElement, up.favorableElements, up.unfavorableElements FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.userId WHERE up.dayMasterElement IS NULL OR up.userId IS NULL ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 10;
